title: Device Decision Request DTO
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/auth/device/decision. A portal-authenticated human submits the decision for a pending device authorization identified by user_code. SECURITY INVARIANT: this request MUST NOT contain the API key; the key is delivered exclusively through the CLI's /api/v1/auth/device/token poll after approval.

user_code.description: Short non-ambiguous uppercase code displayed by the CLI and confirmed in the portal, grouped as XXXX-XXXX.

decision.description: Human decision for the pending device authorization. approved allows the CLI poll endpoint to issue the key; denied causes the CLI poll endpoint to return access_denied.
